forecasts.short: Slight Chance Drizzle then Scattered Rain Showers
forecasts.detailed: A slight chance of drizzle before 11am, then scattered rain showers between 3pm and 5pm, then patchy fog and scattered rain showers. Cloudy, with a high near 47. East wind 5 to 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.
